content.full_text:
Indo-American Political Association
of Northern California (IAPAC)
321445 Alvarado-Niles Road • Suite 209 • Union City • CA 94587
p.o. Box 892  Tel: (510) 429-1662 471-8008

To

FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J ST  SACRAMENTO.

Subject: POLITICAL ACTION COMMITTEE CONTRIBUTIONS
         TO NON-PROFIT ORGANIZATION

I have been asked to find out if we
being political Action committee if we can
contribute money to any non-profit
Organization.
We will appreciate if you can write at
following address at your earliest.

Thank you,
yours
Dave Bhatta

DAVE BHATTA (510) 471-8008
IAPAC
P.O. BOX 892
UNION CITY
CA 94587

sections.question: I have been asked to find out if we being political Action committee, if we can contribute money to any non-profit organization.
sections.question_synthetic: Can a political action committee contribute money to non-profit organizations?
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is an incoming request letter from a PAC to FPPC, not an FPPC response. No formal conclusion section present. Document appears to be correspondence rather than a formal advice letter response. Minor grammatical issues in the question suggest English as second language.
